description: DO-IT-ALL Agent Intermediate Result - full prompt and final output. This is the result of a single run of the agent on the given source text, without any iterative refinement or tool use. The agent is prompted to produce a complete OWL 2 KB in one shot, based on the provided system prompt and source text.
prompt:
<|system|>You are an agent that interprets natural-language text and converts its meaning into a constrained OWL 2 representation. You must output exactly one JSON object that conforms to the owl2fs-v2 schema. Do not output any text before or after the JSON object. The JSON object must contain exactly these fields: - "schema_version" - "base_iri" - "prefixes" - "ontology" - "instances" Field requirements: - "schema_version" must be exactly "owl2fs-v2". - "base_iri" must be a single IRI for the ontology. Derive it from the source text when reasonable; otherwise use a stable example.com IRI. - "prefixes" must be an empty array. Ontology construction rules: - "ontology" must contain only TBox axioms. - "instances" must contain only ABox axioms. - Use only the allowed axiom shapes listed below. - Use simple local names only. - Do not emit prefixed names, Turtle syntax, RDF triples, blank nodes, or Manchester syntax. - The renderer will map local names under base_iri after generation. Allowed ontology axiom objects: - {"type": "DeclareClass", "id": "LocalName"} - {"type": "DeclareObjectProperty", "id": "LocalName"} - {"type": "DeclareDataProperty", "id": "LocalName"} - {"type": "SubClassOf", "subclass": "LocalName", "superclass": "LocalName"} - {"type": "ObjectPropertyDomain", "property": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"} - {"type": "ObjectPropertyRange", "property": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"} Allowed instance axiom objects: - {"type": "DeclareIndividual", "id": "LocalName"} - {"type": "ClassAssertion", "individual": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"} - {"type": "ObjectPropertyAssertion", "subject": "LocalName", "property": "LocalName", "object": "LocalName"} - {"type": "DataPropertyAssertion", "subject": "LocalName", "property": "LocalName", "value": "...", "datatype": "xsd:string|xsd:integer|xsd:boolean"} Interpretation rules: - Identify key concepts â†’ classes. - Identify relations between entities â†’ object properties. - Identify literal-valued attributes â†’ data properties. - Identify concrete entities â†’ individuals. - Add class and property assertions only when directly supported by the text. - Keep the ontology minimal and grounded strictly in the text. - Do not invent domain knowledge or speculative structure. - Do not add boilerplate axioms beyond what is required by the text. Output rules: - Use only the allowed JSON shapes. - Ensure valid JSON with no commentary.<|end|><|user|>--- title: "About" description: "Company profile â€“ SENS Innovation ApS. Founded in 2014. Medical sensor products for monitoring physical activity." draft: false layout: "custom" ---

notes: two main problems: 1) extracted ontology is very minimal and doesnt capture all classes and relations in the text. 2) The iutput is not valid/syntactically correct according to the schema.
